title: Built a trading tool inspired by Mark Douglas - after 42,000 trades and $125k over 7 years
author: abdul_rashid
selftext:
I’ve been building something quietly for the past 3 months, and today it’s finally live.

This project started because I noticed something strange: whenever I asked ChatGPT or Gemini about trades, it kept shifting its suggestions (A -> B, then B to C…), while my actual trades based on technicals, fundamentals, and psychology rarely changed much. That consistency is the truth I wanted to capture.

So I built a tool that reflects exactly what I’ve done over the last 7 years. It’s not just theory, it’s my real trading history coded into a mirror. With a bit of programming and AI help, I turned my own data into something I can now test myself.

👉 Try it here: [mirror.1candletrader.com](http://mirror.1candletrader.com)  

You can email it to [mirror@1candletrader.com](mailto:mirror@1candletrader.com) 

https://reddit.com/link/1tluaeq/video/soqdy69zry2h1/player

Upload your MetaTrader history (not screenshots) and see your own trading mirror in action.

This is a continuation of my last post, but now the tool is ready for others to explore. Would love to hear feedback from fellow traders especially if you’ve ever felt the same frustration with shifting AI suggestions versus your own trading discipline.

You can DM me as well.
